title: EXCLUSIVE: Avalon GloboCare Drops Old Identity, Rebrands as Change Agents to Chase AI Boom
excerpt: Avalon GloboCare Corp. (NASDAQ:ALBT) said Monday it is rebranding as Change Agents Corp. as it completes its transition into a pure-play agentic artificial i...
content_html:
Anusuya Lahiri

Tue, July 21, 2026 at 8:01 AM EDT 3 min read

Avalon GloboCare Corp. (NASDAQ:ALBT) said Monday it is rebranding as Change Agents Corp. as it completes its transition into a pure-play agentic artificial intelligence software company.

The company's common stock will begin trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the new ticker symbol CHGA on July 22, 2026. The name change, ticker change and existing CUSIP number will not affect shareholders' ownership interests. Shareholders do not need to take any action.

The rebranding follows Avalon's acquisition of RPM Interactive. It also reflects the company's shift from a diversified technology business to a software-as-a-service (SaaS) company focused on agentic AI platforms for businesses and content creators.

AI Strategy And Leadership Vision

Michael Mathews, director of Change Agents Corp., recently discussed the company's strategy in an investor interview. He also outlined the Beacon and Catch-Up platforms and the company's long-term AI growth plans.

"Change Agents is more than a new name, it represents our vision for the future," Mathews said. "We are building agentic AI software products designed to deliver material revenue increases for small businesses, brands, and content creators. As artificial intelligence transforms how businesses market, engage customers, and compete online, we believe our platforms are well positioned to help customers capitalize on this shift while creating sustainable, recurring revenue and long-term value for our shareholders."

AI Product Pipeline

The company's portfolio includes Beacon, an AI Generative Engine Optimization platform expected to launch in late third quarter 2026. The platform helps businesses improve their visibility across AI-powered search engines. It also monitors brand presence and boosts discoverability as more consumers turn to AI assistants instead of traditional search engines.

Catch-Up, the company's second platform, is in Phase 2 development. The company is transforming it into an autonomous AI-powered content creation platform for podcasters and social media creators. It is developing the product with Caylent, an Amazon Web Services Premier Tier Services Partner.

Growth Opportunities Beyond Core Platforms

The company is also evaluating additional AI software opportunities in defense, military, security and other enterprise markets.

Legacy Product Business

In addition to its AI business, Change Agents distributes the KetoAir breathalyzer. The non-invasive device measures ketosis levels through a user's breath. The product is sold in North America and is registered with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration as a Class I medical device.

content_html_zh:
阿努苏亚·拉希里

2026 年 7 月 21 日星期二上午 8:01（美国东部时间） 3 分钟阅读时间

Avalon GloboCare Corp.（纳斯达克股票代码：ALBT）周一表示，该公司将更名为 Change Agents Corp.，以完成向纯代理人工智能软件公司的转型。

该公司的普通股将于 2026 年 7 月 22 日开始在纳斯达克资本市场交易，新股票代码为 CHGA。 名称变更、股票代码变更和现有 CUSIP 编号不会影响股东的所有权权益。 股东无需采取任何行动。

此次品牌重塑是在 Avalon 收购 RPM Interactive 之后进行的。 它还反映了该公司从多元化技术业务向专注于为企业和内容创作者提供代理人工智能平台的软件即服务（SaaS）公司的转变。

人工智能战略和领导愿景

Change Agents Corp. 董事迈克尔·马修斯 (Michael Mathews) 最近在一次投资者采访中讨论了该公司的战略。 他还概述了 Beacon 和 Catch-Up 平台以及公司的长期人工智能增长计划。

“变革推动者不仅仅是一个新名字，它代表了我们对未来的愿景，”马修斯说。 “我们正在构建代理人工智能软件产品，旨在为小型企业、品牌和内容创作者带来实质性收入增长。 随着人工智能改变企业营销、吸引客户和在线竞争的方式，我们相信我们的平台能够帮助客户利用这一转变，同时为我们的股东创造可持续的经常性收入和长期价值。”

人工智能产品线

该公司的产品组合包括 Beacon，这是一个人工智能生成引擎优化平台，预计将于 2026 年第三季度末推出。 该平台帮助企业提高在人工智能驱动的搜索引擎中的可见性。 随着越来越多的消费者转向人工智能助手而不是传统搜索引擎，它还可以监控品牌形象并提高可发现性。

该公司的第二个平台 Catch-Up 正处于第二阶段开发阶段。 该公司正在将其转变为一个面向播客和社交媒体创作者的自主人工智能内容创作平台。 该公司正在与 Amazon Web Services 首要一级服务合作伙伴 Caylent 一起开发该产品。

核心平台之外的增长机会

该公司还在评估国防、军事、安全和其他企业市场中的其他人工智能软件机会。

遗留产品业务

除了人工智能业务外，Change Agents 还分销 KetoAir 呼气分析仪。 这种非侵入性设备通过用户的呼吸来测量酮症水平。 该产品在北美销售，并在美国食品和药物管理局注册为I类医疗器械。
